Changelog

2026-03-11

Codex CLI Release: 0.114.0

  • Improved multi-agent resume guidance for long-running sessions.
  • Expanded worktree guardrails for isolated branch workflows.
  • Refined scheduler-driven update delivery examples for operators.

2026-03-10

Codex CLI Release: 0.113.0

  • Improved scheduler-safe Telegram delivery for Codex upstream alerts.
  • Added changelog parsing resilience for updated release markup.
  • Documented advisory issue-signal handling for operators.
